name: login veeva admin quality vault
output: Navigate to '<<vault_url>>'.

name: enter veeva admin username
output: Enter '<<veeva_admin_user>>' in the User Name input field.

name: select quality vault
output: Select '<<quality_vault_name>>' from the Vault dropdown.

name: navigate admin users and groups
output: Click on Users & Groups.

name: search qms owner user
output: Enter '<<qms_owner>>' in the User Name search field.

name: verify qms owner exists
output: Verify that '<<qms_owner>>' user record is present.

name: navigate business admin objects
output: Click on Objects tab.

name: search departments object
output: Search for 'Departments' in the Objects search bar.

name: verify department active
output: Verify that the Department record is in Active state.

name: search organizations object
output: Search for 'Organizations' in the Objects search bar.

name: verify facility initiated
output: Verify that 'Example Facility' record is in Initiated state.

name: navigate change controls
output: Select QMS from the Tab Collections dropdown.

name: click change controls
output: Click on Change Controls under Quality Events.

name: create change control
output: Click the Create button.

name: fill change control fields
output: Enter required values in Title, Description, Justification, Category, Rating, Owning Facility, and Owning Department fields.

name: generate due date
output: Generate a date +5 days in PST and store it as 'due_date'.

name: save change control
output: Click the Save button.

name: store change control 1
output: Store the Change Control record number as '<<changeControl1>>'.

name: mark change control cancelled
output: Select 'Mark as Cancelled' from Workflow Actions.

name: enter cancellation reason
output: Enter '<<Cancellation_Reason>>' in the Cancellation Reason field.

name: verify change control cancelled
output: Verify that the Change Control state is 'Cancelled'.

name: request cancellation
output: Select 'Request Cancellation' verdict.

name: reject cancellation
output: Select 'Reject Cancellation' verdict.

name: approve cancellation
output: Select 'Approve Cancellation' verdict.

name: verify pending cancellation
output: Verify that the Change Control state is 'Pending Cancellation'.

name: verify qms active checkbox
output: Verify that the QMS Active checkbox is checked.

name: search basics customers
output: Search for 'Basics Customers' in Objects.

name: navigate promomats admin
output: Select PromoMats Admin from Tab Collections.

name: click brands tab
output: Click on the Brands tab.

name: create brand
output: Click the +Create button.

name: generate brand name
output: Generate a 4-digit alphanumeric name with prefix 'Brand02_' and store it as 'brand'.

name: select product family
output: Select 'VPM 02 Product' in the Product Family field.

name: verify brand created
output: Verify that the Brand record is displayed.

name: edit brand metadata
output: Enter Brand Abbreviation and Generic Name.

name: create indication
output: Generate a 6-digit alphanumeric indication name and store it as 'indication'.

name: verify indication linked
output: Verify that the Indication record is displayed in the related section.
